svg.aria-label: Sheet Music for "da New Rigged Ship (+ Shelder Geo)"
svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "da New Rigged Ship (+ Shelder Geo)"

text.tspan: da New Rigged Ship (+ Shelder Geo)
Source: Maggie Sansone (Mist and Stone, 1990), also consulting the John Chambers ABC
Collection, which cites Tom Anderson (Ringing Strings, 1983).
Notes: Apparently shifts between Dorian and Mixolydian modes of A. Pairs well with Shelder Geo.
